calendar.matters:
Petition To Amend Order For Final Distribution On Waiver Of Account And Allowing Fees And Costs To Attorney
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexis Chiu appeared by zoom for administrator.

The court stated that it does not think Mr. Chiu has properly framed this, that there are no clerical errors and that it would like to take the petition under submission and ratify the actions taken by the administrator with respect to the IRA assets. The Petition to Amend Order for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
